# safegit redo

restore the commit that undo removed, as a one-shot counterpart to undo

## Flags

| Name | Short | Type | Default | Env | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--bypass-session` |  | bool |  |  | redo across all sessions by ignoring the session ID ownership check |
